next_suggestion: CRITICAL 连续12轮无源码改动:用户需 (1) git stash .claude/工作树变更 (2) git pull --rebase origin/main (3) stash pop (4) 对 9 worktree 逐个 bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh merge <wt-name> 走 sanctioned squash 入 main。merge 完成后 audit-cycle-state.derived_fixes[].status→merged,pending_count→0,status→cycle-complete,下轮触发新全量审计。
